revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Japan]]の[[美術大学]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:にほんのひしゆつたいかく}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|にほんのひしゆつたいかく}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の美術大学|version=95117021}} {{translated page|ja|日本の美術大学|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:日本の美術大学|comment=did a replacement}} [[ja:Category:日本の美術大学]] [[ko:Category:일본의 미술 대학]] [[ru:Category:Художественные вузы Японии]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Nagaoka_Institute_of_Design]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:日本的美术大学]] {{wikidata link|Q29366941}} [[Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[Category:Art Universities in Japan]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:University Types in Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q29366941)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{デフォルトソート:にほんのひしゆつたいかく}} {{citation needed|にほんのひしゆつたいかく}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の美術大学|version=95117021}} {{translated page|ja|日本の美術大学|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:日本の美術大学|comment=did a replacement}} {{wikidata link|Q29366941}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:日本の美術大学]] [[ko:Category:일본의 미술 대학]] [[ru:Category:Художественные вузы Японии]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[zh:Category:日本的美术大学]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Nagaoka_Institute_of_Design]] [[Category:Art schools in Japan]] [[Category:Art Universities in Japan]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:University Types in Japan]]
